headline: 3 Bank Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Banks use their capital and expertise to help businesses grow while offering consumers essential financial products like mortgages and credit cards. Market leaders have certainly capitalized on rising interest rates and strong loan demand to boost profitability, helping fuel a 9.7% gain for the banking industry over the past six months - 1.7 percentage points higher than the S&P 500.
